## Description / Excerpt

A compact Shimmery Memory protocol for checking whether an action, choice, commitment, or obligation includes personal resonance and sovereign consent.

Excerpt:

## What Is the BIFLI Check? **BIFLI** means: > **Because I Feel Like It.** The BIFLI Check is a fast loop diagnostic for sovereignty. It asks whether your action, choice, commitment, advice, or obligation includes your own inner yes — not just external logic, inherited momentum,
